Elden Ring Randomizer Spoiler Log
Seed: 9912345678

=== Key items ===

Rold Medallion -> Dropped by Godrick the Grafted (Stormveil Castle)
Academy Glintstone Key -> On a corpse in the Academy of Raya Lucaria (Liurnia)

=== Items ===

Dropped by Godrick the Grafted (Stormveil Castle) -> Rold Medallion (was Godrick's Great Rune)
On a corpse in the Academy of Raya Lucaria (Liurnia) -> Academy Glintstone Key (was Discarded Palace Key) [key]
Sold by Miriel, Pastor of Vows (Church of Vows) -> Graven-Mass Talisman (was Law of Causality)
On the ground in Farum Azula (Crumbling Farum Azula) -> Somber Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone (was Somber Smithing Stone [8])
